name: Neo Agents AI
tagline: Your AI crew — BA, SA, Designer, Engineer, PM — inside any project.
description: Drop Neo Agents AI into any project and get an interactive AI crew that fills specialist roles. Agents interview you before producing output — no assumptions, no generic templates. Includes a live dashboard with task board, doc viewer, and timeline. Works on any stack: Next.js, React, Python, Flutter, and more.
